summary_ko: Phase 2 - Dev (Implementation) 진입 차단 — pm GitHub phase attestation must be PASS before dev. Run `python pipeline.py gates prepare-phase --phase pm`, push the branch, wait for CI, then run `python pipeline.py gates phase-ci --phase pm`.
expected: Phase dev 진입을 위한 선행 단계 완료
actual: pm GitHub phase attestation must be PASS before dev. Run `python pipeline.py gates prepare-phase --phase pm`, push the branch, wait for CI, then run `python pipeline.py gates phase-ci --phase pm`.
required_actions: python pipeline.py status 로 미완료 phase 확인
미완료 선행 phase를 완료한 후 다시 python pipeline.py check --phase dev 실행
